config_path.description: Path to an LLM cluster config JSON file with configured Ollama, OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic Claude, Sakana Fugu, or Codex providers.

allowed_root.description: Directory that output_path must resolve inside.

output_path.description: Relative or allowed absolute path for generated output.

max_tokens.description: Optional Anthropic Messages API max_tokens override.

task_complexity.description: Optional classification such as easy, hard, or agentic. When no routing_profile is given and this name matches a profile under config routing.profiles, the manager routes to that profile's configured provider and model. If unmatched or absent, routing uses the requested model and configured provider availability.

routing_profile.description: Optional routing hint such as easy, hard, or agentic. When this name matches a profile under config routing.profiles, the manager routes to that profile's configured provider and model, and it takes precedence over task_complexity. If unmatched or absent, routing uses the requested model and configured provider availability.

prompt_cache.description: Provider-managed input-token cache data. The caller may describe stable and dynamic input parts but cannot disable provider caching.

response_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema for structured output. Ollama maps it to format; Responses-compatible providers map it to text.format.
